title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.015 - Term — expiration
text:
52.015.  Term — expiration. — The terms for which collectors are elected expire on the first Monday in March of the year in which they are required to make their last final settlement for the tax book collected by them.
(RSMo 1939 § 11073, A.L. 1959 S.B. 62)
